REQ-01.text: UPGRADE action costs (generatorLevel * config.upgradeBaseCost). If energy >= cost, energy -= cost and generatorLevel += 1.

REQ-02.text: COOL action costs config.coolCost. If energy >= cost, energy -= cost and heat = max(0, heat - config.coolAmount).

REQ-03.text: WAIT action has no immediate state change other than triggering the turn end.

REQ-05.text: End-of-Turn Energy: baseProd = (generatorLevel * config.energyMultiplier). If heat > config.heatThreshold, actualProd = floor(baseProd * config.throttleMultiplier), else actualProd = baseProd. energy += actualProd.

REQ-06.text: Win Condition: If energy >= config.winCondition, status = 'WON'.

REQ-07.text: Stall Condition: If status != 'WON' AND actualProd == 0 AND energy < min(config.coolCost, generatorLevel * config.upgradeBaseCost), status = 'STALLED'.
